## ServeOptions.pluginMetadata property

Plugin metadata for telemetry. If provided, the bootstrap will automatically send analytics events for command lifecycle (started, completed, duration, error).

**Signature:**

```typescript
pluginMetadata?: PluginMetadata;
```
